name: Mushroom and Ham Kabobs with Rosemary Aioli
recipeIngredient: 4 long sprigs of rosemary (remove 3/4 of the rosemary; stem leaving the top of the stem with the needles still in it)
1/2 lb parma ham, cut into 12 chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Using the rosemary stem as a skewer, feed mushrooms and ham onto the stem.
Use 4 mushrooms and 3 pieces of ham per skewer.
2. Brush each skewer with 1 teaspoon of oil.
3. In a large skillet, heat the remaining oil over medium heat.
4. Sear the skewers, turning occasionally, for about 10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, prepare the aioli: In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, chopped rosemary from the stems above, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
6. Remove the skewers from the pan and serve alongside a small bowl of the rosemary aioli.
Yield: 4 servings
